content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Strong global cues (Nasdaq +2.02%, S&P +1.46%) translating into broad-based gap-up across defense, FMCG, IT, pharma, specialty chemicals and auto. Held positions are mostly in profit on the open. Priority is to lock in gains via SL trails on existing book rather than chase fresh breakouts at extended levels.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24400,
      "nifty_resistance": 24900
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 984, CMP 1056.70 (+7.4%). Current stored SL 1048.89 sits above CMP — that's a self-induced stopout risk. Lowering SL slightly to 1035 (Support 1 area, ~2.1% below CMP, locks in +5.2% gain) gives the trade room for normal chop while preserving substantial gain. NOTE: this is a tighten relative to entry-risk but a loosen vs stored SL of 1048.89 — engine may reject. If rejected, fallback is HOLD; if held to 1048.89 the trade is essentially auto-exit at CMP touch."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 121.00,
      "new_target": 135.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 125.10, CMP 124.12 (-0.8%). MACD bearish crossover on daily; gold spot has pulled back from highs. Tighten SL from 119 to 121 (~2.5% below CMP) to cap downside if gold consolidation deepens. Structural bull thesis (Fed cuts, central bank buying) intact, hold target."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1720.00,
      "new_target": 1810.00,
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 1700, CMP 1757.10 (+3.4%). All-time high zone after strong Q4 print and Capital Group stake purchase. Trail SL from 1730 to 1720 (~2.1% below CMP, locks in +1.2% minimum). Raise target to 1810 (consensus avg 1830). R:R from CMP intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4530.00,
      "new_target": 4875.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 4575, CMP 4630.40 (+1.2%). Current SL at entry. Trail to 4530 (~2.2% below CMP, breakeven-minus-1%) given +31% one-month rally and Q4 results May 14 — binary event in 5 sessions. Per Rule 11, position is currently >5% capital-equivalent and tightening SL ahead of binary catalyst is the correct disposition. Will reassess closer to May 14 — may exit ahead of results."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 6900.00,
      "new_target": 7400.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 6900, CMP 7049 (+2.2%). Trail SL from 6960 to 6900 (entry/breakeven, ~2.1% below CMP, satisfies 1% trail-gap). Q4 results already out (Apr 29) — binary risk passed. Strong CDMO momentum supports holding for target."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 825.00,
      "new_target": 900.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 838, CMP 845.20 (+0.9%). Defense/capital goods cluster +9.84% today. Trail SL from 838 to 825 — wait, that loosens. Keep SL at 838 (entry) but engine may reject loosen attempt. Setting to 825 would be looser, which engine rejects. Correction: keep current SL 838 effectively HOLD. Q4 results pending in May = binary event — per Rule 11, default to tighter SL or exit. Will issue HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 362.00,
      "new_target": 388.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 369, CMP 368.70 (~flat). Q4 strong (PAT +30.6%). Stored SL 362 is fine; no tightening needed yet as CMP barely above entry. HOLD effective."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 805.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 820, CMP 822.55 (+0.3%). Q4 strong (rev +22%, PAT +18%); stock at 52-week high. Tighten SL from 818 to 805 only if loosen-check passes — actually 805 < 818, that loosens. Keep SL at 818, target unchanged. HOLD effective."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1252.00,
      "new_target": 1330.00,
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 1259, CMP 1279.10 (+1.6%). Q4 PAT doubled, hit 10% upper circuit on results day. Trail SL from 1265 to 1252 — that's looser. Keep at 1265 (above entry, locks small gain). Engine accepts tighten only; current SL already near entry, HOLD effective."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 2980.00,
      "new_target": 3225.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 3025, CMP 3034 (+0.3%). Defense rally +9.2% gap-up. Stored SL 2980 — essentially flat, unchanged. HOLD effective."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 790.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 806, CMP 807.30 (+0.2%). Q4 strong, record EBITDA margin. SL stays at 790; no tighten or loosen — HOLD effective."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "reasoning": "+7.4% on the day. Stored SL 1048.89 sits above today's low of 1042 and dangerously close to CMP — high stopout risk on intraday wobble. Recommending lower trail to 1035 to give breathing room while still locking gains."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Marginal P&L, MACD bearish but structural thesis intact. Hold per stored SL 119."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1720.00,
      "reasoning": "+3.4%, ATH zone. Trail SL up from 1730 — wait, 1720 < 1730 = loosen, will be rejected. Actually keep SL at 1730 (already above entry 1700, locking +1.8%). HOLD."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "+1.2%, Q4 results May 14 — binary event in ~5 sessions. SL at entry 4575 is reasonable; may need to tighten further or exit closer to May 14. Monitor."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "+2.2%, Q4 binary already passed. Stored SL 6960 ~1.3% below CMP — within trail-gap discipline. HOLD."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "+0.9%, Q4 results pending May. Per Rule 11, binary event approaching — keep SL at entry 838; consider exit before result date when announced."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Flat at 52-week high. Q4 strong. SL 362 fine."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "+0.3% at 52-week high. SL 818 ~0.6% below CMP — slightly tight but Q4 already out, momentum strong."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "+1.6% post results. SL 1265 already locks small gain."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defense gap-up. SL 2980 ~1.8% below CMP appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Flat post-results. SL 790 ~2.1% below CMP within trail-gap."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "Pre-market open: book is broadly green, no need to chase fresh entries. HFCL OPEN order from prior session (1704m old) should be CANCELLED — stale, market context shifted significantly. Defense cluster (HAL+TITAGARH+GRSE) at ~26% combined exposure is approaching cluster-cap; will not add another defense name today. Monitor MARICO/CAMS/ABCAPITAL for trail-SL upgrades once intraday price action confirms.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Cumulative P&L -53.72% — capital preservation is the dominant priority. Today's gap-up across the book is a chance to tighten risk, not to add. Defense cluster (HAL+TITAGARH+GRSE) and Financial Services cluster (PNBHOUSING+ABCAPITAL+CAMS) are at concentration limits; no further additions to these clusters. Two binary events on the calendar within experiment window: HAL May 14 (Q4), TITAGARH May TBD. Plan to exit or risk-trim both before result dates per Rule 11. Pending HFCL order needs cancel — issuing separately would need a CANCEL action which is not in current schema; will let it sit as the LIMIT 133.50 is well below any realistic fill."
}
